String: Execution of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Bloodfest<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> will grant an affect that increases the maximum number of cartridges to 4. Upon learning the trait <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Cartridge Charge II<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> (acquired at level 88), <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Bloodfest<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> will increase the maximum number of cartridges to 6.
